name: labs_buildings
query:
SELECT b.building_id, 
       b.building_name,
       MAX(CASE
             WHEN last_metrics.value >= al.critical THEN 2
             WHEN last_metrics.value >= al.warning THEN 1
             ELSE 0
           END) AS alert_level,
       COUNT(DISTINCT s.sensor_id) AS number_of_sensors,
       SUM(CASE WHEN last_metrics.value >= al.critical THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS number_of_critical,
       SUM(CASE WHEN last_metrics.value >= al.warning AND (al.critical IS NULL OR last_metrics.value < al.critical) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS number_of_warning
FROM labs_sensors s 
left JOIN labs_assets a on s.asset_id = a.asset_id
left join labs_rooms r on r.room_id = s.room_id 
inner  JOIN labs_building b  ON b.building_id = coalesce (a.building_id, r.building_id ) 
left JOIN (
    select distinct on (sensor_id) timestamp, value, sensor_id 
    FROM labs_metrics m
    ORDER BY sensor_id, timestamp DESC
) AS last_metrics ON s.sensor_id = last_metrics.sensor_id
LEFT JOIN labs_alerts al ON al.sensor_id = last_metrics.sensor_id
group by 1,2
